games.reasoning: Houston's home opener against a rebuilding Angels team presents solid value. The Astros' rotation depth and offensive experience should translate well in this spot, with the line undervaluing their home field advantage.
Seattle's pitching staff at home in T-Mobile Park creates a slight edge over Cleveland. The Mariners' rotation has been consistently undervalued by the market in early season home games.
The Dodgers' superior rotation depth and home field advantage at Dodger Stadium provides marginal value. Arizona's early season struggles continue against elite pitching staffs.
San Diego's pitching at Petco Park creates a small edge against Detroit's inconsistent offense. The line slightly favors the road team more than warranted given the venue advantage.
